description: Composition Pink top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, cap sleeves and graphic print on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Wash using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; but do not iron on decoration Crafted from soft cotton with cuts that make you look pretty and perfect, this top from tokyo talkies offers exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit. Team it with denim trousers or skirts and stiletto sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
